Pull The Knife And Stick It Again

Comb Your Hair And Curl It

The Moon And The Seven Stars
Kiss The Maid Behind The Barrel
The Girl Who Broke My Heart
This Is My Love, Do You Like Her?
Ar Éirinn Ní Neosfainn Cé Hí
Behind The Bush In The Garden
The Night Before Larry Was Stretched
The Cape Breton Fiddlers' Society's Welcome To The Shetland Islands
When Sick Is It Tea That You Want?

Bang Your Frog On The Sofa
Will You Come Home With Me?
If We Hadn't Any Women In The World
The Girl I Left Behind Me
The High Part Of The Road
My Mind Will Never Be Easy
An Coileach Ag Fógairt An Lae

Shove The Pig's Foot A Little Closer To The Fire

Happy To Meet, Sorry To Part

For The Sake Of Old Decency

The Cat That Ate The Candle

I Have A House Of My Own With A Chimney Built On Top Of It

Up And About In The Morning
Put Me In The Big Chest

Granny Hold The Candle While I Shave The Chicken's Lip
Riding On A Load Of Hay
Drunk At Night And Dry In The Morning
The Cricket's March Over The Salt Box
An Raibh Tú Ag An gCarraig?
Get Up Old Woman And Shake Yourself
Behind The Ditch In Pairc Anna
The Waltz Of The Little Girls
The Old Wheels Of The World

I Wish I Never Saw You
As I Went Out Upon The Ice
A Fisherman's Song For Attracting Seals
Round The House And Mind The Dresser
The Three Merry Sisters Of Fate
The Cat In The Fiddle Case
If You Will Not Have Me, You May Let Me Go
Over The Hills And Far Away
The Ewe Wi' The Crookit Horn
The Trip We Took Over The Mountain
We Won't Go Home Till Morning
On The Wings Of A Skorie

Larry Get Out Of The Bin
The Fort Of The Fairy Queen
Mazurka Des Écoliers De Saint Genest

Ghoid Iad Mo Bhean Uam An Raoir

Nail That Catfish To The Tree
Sitting In The Stern Of A Boat
Tending The Steer With A Heavy Heart

I'm Not Fed Up With The Pacific Ocean

The Flowers Of The Red Mill
Ye Banks And Braes O' Bonnie Doon
I Have A Bonnet Trimmed With Blue
She Hasn't The Thing She Thought She Had
Grande Nuit In Port Du Peche

The Chicken That Made The Soup
Thank God We're Surrounded By Water
Cruel Is The Snow That Sweeps Glencoe

Cuckold Come Out Of The Amrey

Chuir I Glùn Air A' Bhodach

Up To Your Knees In Sand
